reference: To confirm pregnancy, the only way is to do a pregnancy test. For pregnancy, fertilization of the ovum with sperm is required. Your ovulation and patency tests need to be done, and a semen analysis of your husband should also be conducted. Consult a doctor; do not rely on hearsay from a layperson.
text: To confirm pregnancy, the only way is to do a pregnancy test. For pregnancy, fertilization of the ovum with sperm is required. Your ovulation and patency tests need to be done, and a semen analysis of your husband should also be conducted. Consult a doctor. Do not rely on from a lay person.
